pr.title: 11L SmearGate + BigramHash(10240) + Causal TTT + Mixed Int5/Int6 + SWA

output.summary: Unifies an 11-layer GPT with U-Net skips, SmearGate/BigramHash inputs, causal test-time training, and mixed int5/int6 quantization with pruning/SWA.
techniques: 11-layer GPT with U-Net skip connections plus SmearGate and BigramHash features
Causal test-time training that scores tokens before in-context fine-tuning
Mixed int5/int6 quantization with 3% pruning and SWA
